CVE-2013-2001.title: Buffer overflow in X.org libXxf86vm 1.1.2 and earlier allows X se ...
CVE-2013-2001.description: Buffer overflow in X.org libXxf86vm 1.1.2 and earlier allows X servers to cause a denial of service (crash) and possibly execute arbitrary code via crafted length or index values to the XF86VidModeGetGammaRamp function.
